---
title: "クラスタリング"
date: "更新：`r Sys.time()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float:
      collapsed: false
    df_print: "paged"
    highlight: pygments
    # theme: lumen
    md_extensions: -ascii_identifiers
    css: "template/style_ch.css"
    includes:
      in_header: "template/head.html"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE)
# packages
library(plotly)
library(broom)
# library(pander)
library(knitr)
library(tidyverse)
```
